name: asiai
description: Apple Silicon LLM inference benchmark and monitoring — exposes 11 read-only tools and 3 resources to query local inference engines (Ollama, LM Studio, mlx-lm, llama.cpp, vLLM-MLX, Exo, TurboQuant) on Mac M1–M5.

tools.name: check_inference_health
tools.title: Check Inference Health
tools.description: Quick health check of all local LLM inference engines. Returns status (ok/degraded/error), engines reachable, memory pressure, thermal state, GPU utilization. Responds in <500ms. Use this FIRST to check if inference is available.

tools.name: get_inference_snapshot
tools.title: Full Inference Snapshot
tools.description: Get complete system + inference state: CPU load, memory, thermal, GPU, engines status, loaded models, recent activity.

tools.name: list_models
tools.title: List Loaded Models
tools.description: List all models currently loaded across all inference engines (engine, name, VRAM, quantization, context length).

tools.name: detect_engines
tools.title: Detect Inference Engines
tools.description: Auto-detect running LLM inference engines on this Mac via 3-layer cascade (persistent config → port scan → process detection).

tools.name: run_benchmark
tools.title: Run Inference Benchmark
tools.description: Run a performance benchmark on local LLM inference engines. Measures tok/s, TTFT, VRAM, power. Supports single-engine, multi-engine comparison, and cross-model comparison. Runs 30–120s and is rate-limited (60s cooldown).

tools.name: get_recommendations
tools.title: Get Engine Recommendations
tools.description: Hardware-aware engine and model recommendations for this Mac. Optimized by throughput, latency, or efficiency depending on intent.

tools.name: diagnose
tools.title: Run Diagnostics
tools.description: Comprehensive diagnostic checks: Apple Silicon compat, engines health, local DB integrity, daemon status, alerting config.

tools.name: get_metrics_history
tools.title: Get System Metrics History
tools.description: Query historical system metrics (CPU, RAM, thermal, GPU) from the local SQLite database.

tools.name: get_benchmark_history
tools.title: Get Benchmark History
tools.description: Query past benchmark results from the local database (filter by engine, model, date range).

tools.name: refresh_engines
tools.title: Refresh Engine Detection
tools.description: Re-detect inference engines without restarting the MCP server. Useful after starting/stopping an engine.

tools.name: compare_engines
tools.title: Compare Engines or Models
tools.description: Side-by-side comparison of inference engines or models from local benchmark history.

resources.name: Inference health status
resources.description: Current inference health: memory pressure, thermal state, GPU utilization.

resources.name: Loaded models
resources.description: List of all currently loaded models across engines with engine name, VRAM, quantization, context length.

resources.name: System hardware information
resources.description: Hardware context relevant for LLM inference: chip, RAM total/used, CPU cores, OS version, uptime.
